text: Standing before this luminous and slightly surreal R+D environment, I feel a sense of curiosity stirred in me. The world here is a fusion of sterile modernity and playful, futuristic design. The glow of artificial light prompts me to consider humanity’s restless pursuit of progress—how we enclose ourselves in glass, electrify our ambitions, and distill knowledge into symbols and acronyms. I feel both intrigued by the potential within these walls and slightly detached, wondering if such spaces foster true innovation or serve to simply aestheticize our yearning for advancement.
